title: UI Component Registry
description: Maps the canonical componentId values referenced by mockup data-component attributes and screen Component Tree entries to a runtime constructor. Consumed by the resolver documented in docs/architecture/ui-component-resolver.md.

componentId.description: Stable identifier referenced by mockup data-component attributes and screen Component Tree entries. Whitespace is preserved verbatim from the source.

module.description: Repo-relative path or bare-specifier of the module that exports the component constructor.

exportName.description: Named export inside the module. Use 'default' to reference the default export.

singleton.description: When true, the resolver returns a single shared instance across mount points. Default is per-mount instantiation.

requiredProps.description: Prop names the host site must pass when mounting the component. Optional props are omitted; presentation-only components may omit this field entirely.

owner.description: Task slug or module that primarily owns the component implementation. Informational only.

tags.description: Free-form classification tags (hud, modal, tooltip, popup, panel, viewport, dialog, debug). Informational only.
